title: Login Timeout Issue
description: Users reporting they are being logged out after 5 minutes of inactivity instead of the configured 30 minutes.

title: Update Billing Address
description: Customer needs to update their primary credit card and billing office location.

title: API Documentation Error
description: The endpoint /v1/auth/refresh is returning a 404 in the staging environment but works in production.

title: Password Reset Failure
description: The reset link sent via email is expired immediately upon arrival.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Customer is requesting a native dark mode for the dashboard to reduce eye strain.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading
description: Analytics page takes more than 10 seconds to render for accounts with large datasets.

title: Broken Image Links
description: The profile picture upload is successful, but the image fails to display on the public profile.

title: Subscription Cancellation
description: Customer wants to cancel their premium plan at the end of the current billing cycle.

title: Mobile App Crash on Launch
description: App crashes on iOS 17.4 immediately after the splash screen appears.

title: Language Translation Bug
description: The French translation for 'Submit' is showing as 'Undefined'.

title: Database Migration Inquiry
description: Seeking information on how to migrate historical data from our legacy SQL server to this platform.

title: Two-Factor Auth Not Sending SMS
description: Users in the UK region are not receiving their 2FA codes via SMS.
